title: Event Horizon
description: Event Horizon is a cinematic shader for Minecraft that brings a black hole to the End dimension.
body:
# Realistic black hole in End

![black hole](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a14388840dc4af51cb665e1d2814b9cb7a60875.png)

**Shader has some issues in rendering the sky in other dimensions**

![overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c782c373c946f365b063104b5b88c06b98ccb3f.png)

![nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89d41963685b8ad8bd279fa9b208920609411413.png)
